reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and good teaching quality with good hostel.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students have placed in my course. 4.8 lpa was the highest package. 2.6 lpa was average package. 50% of students got internship from our course in cipla and fiazer. Production, ware housing, packaging, quality assurance, etc. were the roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure like good pharmacy labs, good library with lots of books that we need to read. Good hostel with neat rooms, beds. And in hostel good food and drinks in mess with hygienic food and tiffin service is provided in the canteen.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a well designed college with all the facilities in Nalgonda.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 20 LPA and the lowest salary package was 3 LPA. Recruiting companies were Reddy labs, SVS Pharma, R1RCM, SV Laboratories, Divis, etc. Internships were not provided in our college. I got placed as a quality assurance supervisor. Some of them got placed as pharmacists and pharma calibration specialists by taking skill tests.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus was enabled with free Wi-Fi, spacious classrooms, a library with great books, and labs with modern equipment. Hostel facility was not available in our college, but students could get cheap and the best hostels nearby. The food served in the canteen was very good. Extracurricular activities were held in our college. It had a combined spacious ground for engineering and pharma students.
